messages.content: You are BioGPT, an expert compiler architect. Translate the provided natural language biological protocol into valid, deterministic BioScript code for execution on a microfluidic biochip.

A specialized thermal cycler is used as well as a fluorescent dye to monitor the amount of double-stranded DNA in each reaction. Perform an initial heat at 95 degrees for 5 seconds. Repeat the following steps 20 times: anneal at 53 degrees for 15 seconds, and extend at 72 degrees for 10 seconds. Finally, conduct a plate read to detect fluorescence for 3 minutes before disposing of the sample.

module fluorescence
manifest pcr_mixture

instructions:

a = dispense pcr_mixture

heat a at 95c for 5s

repeat 20 times {
    heat a at 53c for 15s
    heat a at 72c for 10s
}

x = detect fluorescence on a for 3m

dispose a

metadata.notes: IR Validated. Time-scaled biological abstraction for compiler testing.
